message:
test(dynamic): 33 unit tests for Value type, coerce methods, and Object

Add comprehensive tests to the foundational frankenterm-dynamic crate's
Value type which previously had zero unit tests:

- variant_name: all 8 variant names verified
- Equality: same-type, cross-type, clone-eq invariant
- coerce_unsigned: u64, positive/negative i64, whole/fractional f64, NaN
- coerce_signed: i64, small/large u64, f64 edge cases, infinity
- coerce_float: f64, i64, u64, non-numeric types
- Debug formatting: Null→"nil", quoted strings, bool/number display
- Hash consistency: equal values produce equal hashes
- Array/Object: construction, iteration, get_by_str

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
